name: EGO POWER+ 56V Select Cut 21" Self-Propelled Mower Kit (7.5Ah)
description: The EGO Select Cut is one of the best-selling battery mowers in America. It uses a multi-blade system with three interchangeable lower blades (mulching, high-lift bagging, and extended runtime) so you can optimize for the task at hand. Touch Drive self-propelled technology lets you control speed with a simple dial -- no awkward bail bar to squeeze.
features: Select Cut multi-blade system with 3 interchangeable lower blades
Touch Drive variable-speed self-propelled with dial control
3-in-1: mulching, side discharge, or rear bagging
LED headlights for low-light mowing
Folds flat for compact upright storage

name: Ryobi 40V HP Brushless 21" CrossCut Self-Propelled Mower Kit
description: Ryobi's top-of-the-line 21-inch mower uses a CrossCut dual-blade system for a cleaner cut and better mulching. It comes with two 6.0Ah batteries so you can mow up to 70 minutes on a charge -- enough for most 3/4-acre lots. It runs on the same 40V batteries as 85+ other Ryobi outdoor tools, making it a smart buy if you're already in that ecosystem.
features: CrossCut multi-blade system for superior cut quality and mulching
Smart Trek adaptive variable-speed self-propel matches your walking pace
Two 6.0Ah batteries included for extended runtime
3-in-1: mulching, bagging, and side discharge
Compatible with 85+ Ryobi 40V tools

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 15" POWERLOAD String Trimmer with Carbon Fiber Shaft Kit (4.0Ah)
description: This is the string trimmer that makes reloading line painless. EGO's POWERLOAD technology winds the line automatically -- just feed it in and press a button. The carbon fiber shaft keeps the weight down without sacrificing strength, and the brushless motor delivers up to 50 minutes of trimming per charge.
features: POWERLOAD auto-winding head loads trimmer line with the push of a button
Carbon fiber split shaft -- folds for easy storage and transport
Dual-feed spiral twist 0.095" professional-grade cutting line
Variable speed trigger for precise control and extended battery life
IPX4 weather resistant rating

name: Milwaukee M18 FUEL 18V String Trimmer w/ QUIK-LOK Kit (8.0Ah)
description: Milwaukee's M18 FUEL trimmer is the go-to for anyone already invested in the M18 battery system. The QUIK-LOK attachment system is the real selling point: swap the trimmer head for an edger, hedge trimmer, or pole saw attachment in seconds. The 8.0Ah High Output battery delivers about an hour of runtime with serious cutting power.
features: QUIK-LOK attachment system compatible with edger, hedge trimmer, pole saw, and more
POWERSTATE brushless motor reaches full throttle in under 1 second
M18 REDLITHIUM HIGH OUTPUT XC8.0 battery included
Adjustable 14-16 inch cutting swath
Compatible with 250+ M18 tools

name: DeWalt 20V MAX 14" Brushless Folding String Trimmer Kit (5.0Ah)
description: DeWalt's folding string trimmer is perfect if garage space is tight. An innovative hinge reduces the stored length by 40%, and the QuickLoad spool makes line changes fast and easy. The 14-inch cutting swath is narrower than some competitors, but the brushless motor and gear drive deliver reliable cutting power for typical suburban yards.
features: Folding hinge reduces length by 40% for compact storage
QuickLoad spool for fast and easy line replacement
Variable-speed trigger with Hi/Lo speed switch
Patented gear drive design maintains cut speed under load
Compatible with all DeWalt 20V MAX batteries

name: Ryobi 40V HP Brushless 15" Carbon Fiber Attachment-Capable String Trimmer Kit (4.0Ah)
description: Ryobi's premium string trimmer uses a carbon fiber shaft for durability without extra weight. Like Milwaukee, it supports attachments -- Ryobi's EXPAND-IT system lets you add an edger, pole saw, blower, and more. The adjustable 13-15 inch cutting swath lets you trade width for extended battery life when you need it.
features: EXPAND-IT attachment compatible for edger, blower, pole saw, and more
Carbon fiber shaft for lightweight durability
REEL EASY+ 3-in-1 bump feed head reloads in 60 seconds
Adjustable 13-15 inch cutting swath for runtime vs. productivity
40V rapid charger included for 4X faster charging

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 650 CFM Handheld Leaf Blower Kit (5.0Ah)
description: This blower punches above its weight class. At 650 CFM and 180 MPH on turbo, it outperforms many gas handheld blowers while running far quieter. The variable speed dial lets you tone it down for clearing flower beds without blasting away mulch, and the 5.0Ah battery delivers up to 90 minutes of runtime on lower settings.
features: 650 CFM and 180 MPH turbo performance rivals gas blowers
Variable-speed trigger plus adjustable speed lock dial
Includes flat and tapered concentrator nozzles
Up to 90 minutes runtime on low with 5.0Ah battery
Weather-resistant construction with 5-year tool warranty

name: Milwaukee M18 FUEL 18V Gen II Handheld Blower Kit (8.0Ah)
description: Milwaukee's M18 FUEL blower won't win a spec-sheet war on raw CFM, but it compensates with refinement. The Gen II is noticeably quieter (61 dB) than most competitors, reaches full throttle in under a second, and weighs just 6 pounds bare. If you're already in the M18 ecosystem and need a blower for a typical suburban lot, it's a no-brainer -- but for heavy leaf-clearing duty, consider a more powerful dedicated outdoor brand.
features: POWERSTATE brushless motor reaches full throttle in under 1 second
One of the lightest cordless blowers at 6 lbs bare weight
Gen II design is 20% faster airflow with lower noise
Variable speed trigger plus high/low switch
Compatible with 250+ M18 tools

name: DeWalt 20V MAX XR 450 CFM Handheld Leaf Blower Kit (5.0Ah)
description: DeWalt's 20V blower is the value play in this category. At under $200 with a battery included, it's an easy add-on if you already own DeWalt 20V tools. At 450 CFM it won't compete with EGO's 650 CFM beast for heavy leaf duty, but it handles everyday driveway and sidewalk cleanup with ease. Notably quiet at 66 dB.
features: Lightweight and ergonomic design reduces user fatigue
Variable-speed trigger with speed lock for sustained use
Concentrator nozzle for focused clearing power
Low-noise 66 dB operation ideal for noise-sensitive neighborhoods
Compatible with all DeWalt 20V MAX batteries

name: Ryobi 40V HP Brushless Whisper Series 600 CFM Handheld Blower Kit (4.0Ah)
description: Ryobi's Whisper Series blower delivers strong 600 CFM performance while being 85% quieter than a gas blower. At just $179 with a battery, it's one of the best values in cordless blowers. The 22-minute runtime on turbo is modest, but the variable speed trigger and cruise control help you stretch it for typical yard work. If you need more time, grab a second 40V battery.
features: Whisper Series: 85% quieter than gas blowers at 59 dB
600 CFM and 155 MPH with turbo button
Variable speed trigger with cruise control for sustained blowing
Lightweight at 6.6 lbs bare tool weight
Compatible with 85+ Ryobi 40V tools

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 18" Chainsaw Kit (5.0Ah)
description: EGO's 18-inch chainsaw delivers the cutting power of a 45cc gas saw without the noise, fumes, or pull-start hassle. It rips through 4x4s and handles downed trees up to 16 inches in diameter with ease. Tool-free chain tensioning makes adjustments quick, and the 5.0Ah battery gets you about 300 cuts on a 4x4 before needing a recharge.
features: Equivalent to 45cc gas chainsaw performance
Tool-free chain tensioning and bar tightening
Up to 300 cuts per charge on 4x4 lumber
IPX4 weather-resistant with LED work light
5-year tool warranty, 3-year battery warranty

name: Milwaukee M18 FUEL 18V 16" Chainsaw Kit (12.0Ah)
description: Milwaukee's 16-inch chainsaw is a beast that runs on the same M18 batteries as your drill and impact driver. The massive 12.0Ah High Output battery delivers about 150 cuts per charge on 6x6 lumber, and the POWERSTATE motor maintains speed under heavy load without bogging down. It's pricier than dedicated outdoor brands, but if you're deep in the M18 ecosystem, the battery compatibility is a huge advantage.
features: POWERSTATE brushless motor maintains speed under load
Full throttle in under 1 second for immediate cutting power
Includes M18 REDLITHIUM HIGH OUTPUT HD12.0 battery
Automatic chain oiler and tool-free chain tensioning
Compatible with 250+ M18 tools

name: DeWalt FLEXVOLT 60V MAX 16" Brushless Chainsaw Kit (3.0Ah)
description: DeWalt's 60V FLEXVOLT chainsaw is a solid mid-range choice for homeowners who need a reliable 16-inch saw. The FLEXVOLT battery is clever engineering -- it automatically switches between 20V and 60V modes, so the same battery that runs this chainsaw also works in your 20V drill. About 70 cuts per charge on 6x6 pressure-treated lumber with the included 3.0Ah battery.
features: FLEXVOLT battery works in both 60V and 20V MAX tools
Tool-free chain tensioning with tooled/toolless bar retention
Auto-oiling for continuous chain lubrication
Low kickback bar and chain brake for safety
High-efficiency brushless motor for extended run time

name: DeWalt 20V MAX XR Compact 12" Brushless Chainsaw Kit (5.0Ah)
description: This compact 12-inch chainsaw is perfect for the homeowner who needs to trim branches, cut up firewood, or handle storm cleanup without a full-size saw. At just 9 lbs with the battery, it's light enough to use one-handed on a ladder. It won't replace a gas saw for felling trees, but for limbs up to 10 inches in diameter, it's quick, quiet, and runs on the same 20V batteries as the rest of your DeWalt tools.
features: Compact and lightweight at only 9 lbs with battery
Up to 90 cuts per charge on 4x4 lumber
Low kickback Oregon bar and chain
Tool-free chain tensioning and bar tightening
Compatible with all DeWalt 20V MAX batteries

name: Ryobi 40V HP Brushless 18" Chainsaw Kit (5.0Ah)
description: Ryobi's 18-inch chainsaw delivers more power than a 40cc gas saw at a price that's hard to beat. At 168 cuts per charge on 4x4 lumber, it has solid endurance for weekend firewood or storm cleanup. It handles softwoods with ease and can power through seasoned hardwood rounds, though it's happiest on trunks up to about 14-16 inches. Shares batteries with the entire Ryobi 40V outdoor lineup.
features: More power than a 40cc gas chainsaw
Up to 168 cuts per charge on 4x4 pine
Mechanical chain brake and auto-oiler
Side-access chain tensioning
Compatible with 85+ Ryobi 40V tools

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 24" Brushless Hedge Trimmer Kit (2.5Ah)
description: EGO's hedge trimmer was the first cordless model to match the 1-inch branch-cutting capacity you'd expect from a gas or corded trimmer. The 24-inch dual-action blades make clean, precise cuts at 3,000 strokes per minute, and the 2.5Ah battery is good for about an hour of continuous trimming. It's lightweight, well-balanced, and the blades are fully serviceable for resharpening.
features: Industry-first 1-inch cutting capacity in a cordless hedge trimmer
24-inch dual-action hardened steel blades
3,000 strokes per minute for clean cuts
Serviceable blades for resharpening
5-year tool warranty

name: Ryobi 40V HP Brushless 26" Hedge Trimmer Kit (2.0Ah)
description: Ryobi's 26-inch hedge trimmer is the budget-friendly pick that still gets the job done. The extra-long 26-inch blade covers more hedge per pass than most competitors, and at $159 with a battery, it's about $100 less than the EGO. The 3/4-inch cutting capacity handles most residential hedges without issue. A great entry point if you're starting a 40V Ryobi collection.
features: 26-inch dual-action blades for maximum reach
Wrap-around front handle for comfortable cutting at any angle
3/4-inch cutting capacity for typical residential hedges
Lightweight ergonomic design
Compatible with 85+ Ryobi 40V tools

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 2100 PSI Compact Pressure Washer Kit (6.0Ah)
description: EGO's compact pressure washer is the first truly practical cordless option for homeowners. At 2100 PSI it handles car washing, deck cleaning, patio furniture, and siding with ease. No extension cords, no gas, no fumes -- just connect a garden hose, drop in a battery, and go. Three modes (ECO, High, Turbo) let you balance power and battery life. The 30-minute runtime on a single 6.0Ah battery covers most home cleaning jobs.
features: Three cleaning modes: ECO, High, and Turbo up to 2100 PSI
Compact portable design at 29.6 lbs
Includes foam cannon, turbo nozzle, and 3 spray tips
25-foot flexible high-pressure hose
5-year tool warranty, 3-year battery warranty

name: EGO POWER+ 56V 3200 PSI Pressure Washer Kit (2x 6.0Ah)
description: EGO's flagship pressure washer is a serious machine that rivals gas-powered models. Using two 56V batteries simultaneously, it delivers up to 3200 PSI and 2.0 GPM -- enough for heavy-duty concrete cleaning, paint stripping, and commercial-grade tasks. It's the most powerful cordless pressure washer on the market, but the $799 price tag means it's best for homeowners who'll use it regularly.
features: Dual-battery design delivers up to 3200 PSI and 2.0 GPM max
Most powerful cordless pressure washer available
Includes 5 spray tips for different cleaning tasks
Up to 60 minutes runtime with two 6.0Ah batteries
No gas, no fumes, no pull-start hassle

name: DeWalt FLEXVOLT 60V MAX 20" Brushless Chainsaw Kit (4.0Ah)
description: DeWalt's 20-inch FLEXVOLT chainsaw is their most powerful cordless saw, delivering performance comparable to a 50cc gas chainsaw with up to 3.49 HP equivalent. The 20-inch bar handles serious tree work and large-diameter logs that smaller cordless saws can't touch. The FLEXVOLT battery works across both 60V and 20V DeWalt tools, making this a smart choice for homeowners already invested in the DeWalt ecosystem who need real chainsaw capability.
features: Peak power equivalent to a 50cc gas chainsaw (3.49 HP)
20-inch bar for large-diameter cutting jobs
2.43X more torque than smaller cordless chainsaws
Low kickback bar with chain brake for safety
FLEXVOLT battery backward-compatible with 20V MAX tools
